title: 2nd DRAFT TERMS OF REFERENCE BANDEBEREHO Mainland - Community-Based Social Norms Change and GBV Prevention Program
description: Terms of Reference for designing and piloting a community-based social norms change and gender-based violence (GBV) prevention program in Tanzania Mainland, based on the Bandebereho model. Part of PAMOJA Project (World Bank funded).

contact.name: Ministry of Community Development, Gender, Women and Special Groups

eligibility: Consultants/firms with experience in GBV prevention, social norms change, and community-based programs
